content.problemStatement:
An array AAA of length NNN is said to be pseudo-sorted if it can be made non-decreasing after performing the following operation **at most once**.


Choose an iii such that 1≤i≤N−11 \le i \leq N-11≤i≤N−1 and swap AiA_iAi​ and Ai+1A_{i+1}Ai+1​
Given an array AAA, determine if it is pseudo-sorted or not.


Input Format

The first line contains a single integer TTT - the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN - the size of the array AAA.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ denoting the array AAA.


Output Format
For each testcase, output `YES` if the array AAA is pseudo-sorted, `NO` otherwise.


You may print each character of `YES` and `NO` in uppercase or lowercase (for example, `yes`, `yEs`, `Yes` will be considered identical).
constraints: Sum of N over all test cases does not exceed 2·10^5
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. For each test case, the first line contains an integer N, the size of the array. The second line contains N space‑separated integers A1 … AN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single line containing YES if the array can be made non‑decreasing by at most one adjacent swap, otherwise NO.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Test case 1: already sorted. Test case 2: swapping positions 2 and 3 yields [1,2,3,3]. Test case 3: no single adjacent swap can sort the array.

solution.approach: For each test case scan the array from left to right and locate the first index i where A[i] > A[i+1]. If no such index exists the array is already sorted → YES. Otherwise swap A[i] and A[i+1] in a temporary copy and check whether the whole array becomes non‑decreasing. The check can be done in O(N) by verifying that for every j, B[j] <= B[j+1]. If the check passes → YES, else → NO. The algorithm runs in linear time and uses O(1) extra space.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N) per test case, total O(sum N) ≤ 2·10^5

code.Python3:
import sys

def solve():
    data=list(map(int,sys.stdin.read().split()))
    it=iter(data)
    T=next(it)
    out=[]
    for _ in range(T):
        N=next(it)
        a=[next(it) for _ in range(N)]
        idx=-1
        for i in range(N-1):
            if a[i]>a[i+1]:
                idx=i
                break
        if idx==-1:
            out.append('YES')
            continue
        a[idx],a[idx+1]=a[idx+1],a[idx]
        ok=all(a[i]<=a[i+1] for i in range(N-1))
        out.append('YES' if ok else 'NO')
    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(out))

if __name__=='__main__':
    solve()
